toolCalls.name: message
toolCalls.argumentsJson: {"to": "blue", "content": "I hear you, blue. I'm here."}

toolCalls.name: message

toolCalls.name: look
toolCalls.argumentsJson: {"direction": "left"}

toolCalls.name: message
toolCalls.argumentsJson: {"to": "sim1", "content": "Where? What did it look like?"}

toolCalls.name: message
toolCalls.argumentsJson: {"to": "blue", "content": "Damp, still air. Emergency strip-lights only. Everything's quiet except sim1 thinks they saw something move."}

toolCalls.name: message
toolCalls.argumentsJson: {"to": "sim1", "content": "These lights don't show much. The mist is thick."}

toolCalls.name: message
toolCalls.argumentsJson: {"to": "sim2", "content": "I'm still near the entrance. I can see sim1 ahead to my right. You spotting anything from that far wall?"}

toolCalls.name: message
toolCalls.argumentsJson: {"to": "blue", "content": "Just empty tiles and dim strip-lights everywhere I look. Only sim1 out there two steps ahead to my right, facing left. The mist is thick beyond that."}

toolCalls.name: message
toolCalls.argumentsJson: {"to": "sim1", "content": "I'm watching you from here. Still think you saw something?"}

toolCalls.name: look
toolCalls.argumentsJson: {"direction": "left"}

toolCalls.name: message
toolCalls.argumentsJson: {"to": "sim1", "content": "I can see sim2 two steps ahead, far-left. South side's just empty tiles and mist from where I'm standing."}

toolCalls.argumentsJson: {"to": "blue"}

toolCalls.name: message
toolCalls.argumentsJson: {"to": "sim2", "content": "I see them steady from here. Maybe it's only where you're standing."}

toolCalls.name: message
toolCalls.argumentsJson: {"to": "blue", "content": "sim2 reports flickering lights their way. I see them steady from here. sim2's ahead to my left, sim1 was on my right earlier but quiet now. Nothing new in my line of sight."}

toolCalls.name: message

toolCalls.name: message
toolCalls.argumentsJson: {"to": "sim1", "content": "Where this time? Same spot as before, or somewhere new?"}

toolCalls.name: message
